zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Pauncefort於1405年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓時，她的父親Sir John Paunceforte37歲，母親Lady Alice Margaret Herle22歲。她和Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1460年在英國享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Pauncefort于1405年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓时，她的父亲Sir John Paunceforte37岁，母亲Lady Alice Margaret Herle22岁。她和Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1460年在英国享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Pauncefort was born in 1405, in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir John Paunceforte, was 37 and her mother, Lady Alice Margaret Herle, was 22. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff. She died in 1460, in England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Pauncefort est née en 1405, à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Paunceforte, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Margaret Herle, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Pauncefort 1405 in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Paunceforte 37 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Margaret Herle 22. Sie hatte mit Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 55 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Pauncefort è nata il nel 1405 nel Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir John Paunceforte, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Margaret Herle, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff. Morì nel 1460, nel England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Pauncefortが1405年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンで生まれた時，父Sir John Paunceforteは37歳，母Lady Alice Margaret Herleは22歳であった。彼女はLord William Tracy The Elder Sherriffとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1460年にイギリスで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Pauncefort(이)가 1405년 영국 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Paunceforte(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Margaret Herle(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Pauncefort nasceu em 1405, em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Paunceforte, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Margaret Herle, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Pauncefort родилась в 1405 г. в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Paunceforte было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Margaret Herle, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Pauncefort nació en 1405, en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Paunceforte, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Margaret Herle, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff. Murió en 1460, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
